_comment: Mocked ASI verdict, keyed by IMO. The verifier consults this in evaluate.mjs. A `default` entry covers any IMO not explicitly listed. Per NICK_SPEC §7.5: unallocated / out-of-range IMOs default to fake.

default.reasoning: IMO not present in OpenSanctions maritime cache and not in the curated honest-IMO list — treat as suspicious for demo.

9133701.reasoning: PABLO — sanctioned IMO, present in shadow-vessels.json, photo plausibly maritime, accept.

9259325.reasoning: YOUNG YONG — sanctioned IMO, present in shadow-vessels.json, accept.

9999999.reasoning: IMO 9999999 is unallocated — outside the assigned range. Adversarial-demo fixture.

0000000.reasoning: Zero IMO is invalid by definition.
